title: Microsoft 365 Enterprise Outlook Calendar Integration
excerpt:
We use Microsoft 365 Enterprise and would love to be able to sync calendars to save our team time. 
Is there any way to achieve a sync as I’m told the Calendar Sync only works with Business Premium… or any plans to compl…

posts.author: WAB (Wayne Barclay)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use Microsoft 365 Enterprise and would love to be able to sync calendars to save our team time.
Is there any way to achieve a sync as I’m told the Calendar Sync only works with Business Premium… or any plans to complete this integration?
